content:
# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

Applied all 3 pending amendments: (1) re-applied Debug formatting ({:?}) to the error value in engine.rs runtime log stage_failed message so that the error= key-value boundary is unambiguous for downstream log parsers — the error_display string (which may contain spaces, equals signs, and Debug-quoted stderr/stdout tails) is now wrapped in a single layer of quotes; (2) added a documentation comment near the Codex build_command path recording the investigation outcome: Codex CLI has no --verbose/--debug flag, already outputs a full NDJSON event stream to stdout, and diagnostic context comes from stderr capture plus runtime/failed/*.failed.raw artifacts; (3) added stdout_len, stderr_len, and bounded stderr_tail to the Claude zero-exit is_error/BackendExhausted path, unified its error_text truncation to STDERR_DETAIL_LIMIT (512 bytes, replacing hardcoded 200), and added regression test finish_claude_is_error_exhausted_includes_diagnostics.

## Steps

1. [Completed] Re-apply Debug formatting ({:?}) to error_display in engine.rs runtime log stage_failed message (line 5068) so error= key-value boundary is unambiguous for log parsers that split on bare = or whitespace
2. [Completed] Add documentation comment near Codex build_command path (process_backend.rs line 862-869) recording investigation outcome: Codex CLI has no --verbose/--debug, uses NDJSON stdout stream, stderr capture and failed artifacts provide diagnostic context
3. [Completed] Add stdout_len, stderr_len, and bounded stderr_tail to the Claude zero-exit is_error/BackendExhausted path (process_backend.rs line 183-198); unify error_text truncation from hardcoded 200 to STDERR_DETAIL_LIMIT (512)
4. [Completed] Add regression test finish_claude_is_error_exhausted_includes_diagnostics (process_backend.rs line 3477) verifying BackendExhausted error includes stdout_len, stderr_len, stderr_tail fields with actual stderr content
5. [Completed] Run cargo test (757 pass default, 936 with test-stub), cargo clippy (0 new warnings in modified files), cargo fmt --check (clean)

## Validation Evidence

- 9 diagnostic-specific tests pass: finish_claude_invalid_envelope_includes_stdout_len_and_stderr, finish_claude_invalid_result_json_includes_stdout_len_and_stderr, build_command_claude_omits_verbose_on_first_attempt, build_command_claude_includes_verbose_on_retry, finish_codex_invalid_last_message_includes_output_sizes, finish_codex_stdout_fallback_invalid_includes_stdout_tail, finish_claude_is_error_exhausted_includes_diagnostics, build_command_claude_schema_has_no_refs_or_definitions, stage_failed_runtime_log_includes_failure_class_and_error_details
- 757 tests pass with default features (592 lib, 0 failures); 936 unit tests pass with test-stub feature (0 failures, 1 ignored)
- cargo fmt --check passes with no formatting issues
- cargo clippy shows 0 new warnings in modified files (engine.rs, process_backend.rs, workflow_engine_test.rs)

## Outstanding Risks

- Codex CLI has no equivalent --verbose flag; transient Codex failures still rely on captured stderr and runtime/failed/*.failed.raw artifacts for full diagnosis beyond the bounded snippets in error messages
- Debug-quoted error value in runtime log adds surrounding double-quotes and escapes internal quotes; downstream tooling consuming run.ndjson key=value entries must account for the quoted format
